description: Create Rust git module with data structures matching TypeScript types
steps: Create src-tauri/src/git/mod.rs (or src-tauri/src/commands/git.rs)
Define ChangedFileStatus, ChangedFile, DiffLineType, DiffLine, DiffHunk, FileDiff structs
Add serde derives with rename_all = camelCase/lowercase to match TS naming
Add git module to src-tauri/src/lib.rs imports

description: Implement git_status and get_git_diff Tauri commands
steps: Implement git_status command: run 'git status --porcelain=v1 -z', parse XY codes
Implement get_git_diff command: run 'git diff [--cached] -- <file>', parse unified diff
Map git status codes to ChangedFileStatus (M→Modified, A→Added, D→Deleted, R→Renamed, ??→Untracked)
Parse diff hunks with header regex (@@ -old_start,old_lines +new_start,new_lines @@)
Parse diff lines (+→Add, -→Remove, ' '→Context)
Return Result<T, String> with human-readable errors
Register commands in invoke_handler in src-tauri/src/lib.rs

description: Add Rust unit tests for git parser
steps: Add #[cfg(test)] mod tests to git module
Test git_status parser with sample porcelain output (modified, added, deleted, renamed, untracked)
Test get_git_diff parser with sample unified diff (single hunk, multiple hunks, empty diff)
Test edge case: renamed file, empty diff (hunks: [])
Run cargo test and verify all pass
Run cargo clippy -- -D warnings and fix any issues

description: Create TauriGitService that implements GitService interface
steps: Add TauriGitService class in src/features/diff/services/gitService.ts
Implement getStatus(): call invoke('git_status', { cwd }), return ChangedFile[]
Implement getDiff(file, staged): call invoke('get_git_diff', { cwd, file, staged }), return FileDiff
Implement stageFile/unstageFile/discardChanges: throw new Error('not implemented')
Add cwd parameter to constructor (workspace path)
Import @tauri-apps/api/core for invoke()

description: Update createGitService factory to select TauriGitService under Tauri
steps: Update createGitService() in src/features/diff/services/gitService.ts
Check if test mode: return MockGitService
Check if Tauri: '__TAURI_INTERNALS__' in window → return new TauriGitService(cwd)
Fallback: return new HttpGitService()
Accept optional cwd parameter (defaults to '.' or workspace root)
Update function signature to accept cwd parameter

description: Create DiffPanelContent component that uses existing diff components
steps: Create src/features/diff/components/DiffPanelContent.tsx
Accept cwd prop from parent (workspace path)
Use useGitStatus() hook to fetch changed files
Use useFileDiff(selectedFile) hook to fetch diff for selected file
Render loading state: centered 'Loading diff…'
Render error state: centered error text with role='alert'
Render empty state: centered div with 'flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center' (FIX: add w-full)
Render populated state: horizontal split with ChangedFilesList (~240px) + DiffViewer (flex-1)
Add local state for selectedFile (first file auto-selected when status loads)
Reuse existing ChangedFilesList and DiffViewer components from src/features/diff/components/

description: Wire DiffPanelContent into BottomDrawer's Diff Viewer tab
steps: Update src/features/workspace/components/BottomDrawer.tsx
Import DiffPanelContent from src/features/diff/components/DiffPanelContent
Replace DiffContent placeholder with <DiffPanelContent cwd={workspacePath} />
Pass cwd prop from WorkspaceView to BottomDrawer
Update WorkspaceView to pass workspace path as cwd prop
Remove old DiffContent component definition

description: Add TypeScript tests for DiffPanelContent and TauriGitService
steps: Create src/features/diff/components/DiffPanelContent.test.tsx
Test: renders loading state while fetching
Test: renders empty state with centered wrapper (verify classes include w-full)
Test: renders ChangedFilesList + DiffViewer when changes exist
Test: auto-selects first file when status loads
Create src/features/diff/services/gitService.test.ts (extend existing)
Test: TauriGitService.getStatus() calls invoke with correct args
Test: TauriGitService.getDiff() calls invoke with correct args
Test: createGitService returns TauriGitService when __TAURI_INTERNALS__ exists
Run npm run test and verify all pass

description: Run all linters and type checks to ensure quality
steps: Run npm run lint and fix any issues
Run npm run type-check and fix any type errors
Run cargo fmt to format Rust code
Run cargo clippy -- -D warnings and fix all warnings
Run npm run test and verify 100% pass
Run cargo test and verify 100% pass
Verify no new Rust dependencies added (check Cargo.toml)
